name: Macaroni and Cheese Like a Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 or 5 Kalamata olives, pitted and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni until tender.
2. Drain well.
3. Transfer the macaroni to a mixing bowl and toss immediately with the olive oil.
4. Add vinegar and toss again.
5. Add the feta, olives, oregano, and pepper.
(Additional salt is not necessary because of the feta.)
6. Toss everything together until well combined.
7. Serve hot or at room temperature.
Yield: 1-2 servings
